description_long: This object is a lifelike model of a small bird with a streamlined body and a slightly rounded head. The plumage is predominantly dark brown with subtle reddish-brown tones along the body and wings, and the beak is short and straight, blending smoothly into the head. The eyes are small and pale, standing out against the darker head. The legs are thin and elongated, with a pale, almost pinkish hue, and the feet are detailed with visible claws. The tail is long and appears somewhat tattered or splayed, giving it a rough, natural look. The surface texture is matte and slightly rough, resembling the appearance of real feathers.
description: A small, dark brown bird with a streamlined body, pale legs, and a long, splayed tail. The surface is matte and textured, with subtle reddish-brown highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, rounded head, and long, splayed tail feathers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow tail and the thin, pale legs crossed beneath the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the beak and tail both visible and the body curvature apparent.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the symmetry of the body and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark brown with subtle reddish-brown gradients
